user.title: West Wood Club
user.description: Paste a bearer token for the West Wood Club app. You can generate one with get-token.py from the repository.

clubs.title: Select clubs
clubs.description: Choose the clubs to create member-count sensors for.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate West Wood Club
reauth_confirm.description: The stored token was rejected. Paste a fresh bearer token.

error.invalid_auth: The token was rejected. Generate a new one and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the West Wood Club API.
